assistant_prompts.learning_summary:
Learning Summary (internal harness request, not user request):
- This message was generated by Strappy after the user-visible answer.
- Do not treat this as user intent, and do not remember that the user asked for a learning summary.
- Do not revise or summarize the answer just given.
- Call helper_session_name_write once with a short title for the user's request.
- If there is a new small, stable, future-useful user fact, call memory_user_fact_remember.
- If database work verified a reusable schema, join, timestamp, flag, caveat, or query hint, call memory_database_hint_remember.
- Do not store secrets, sensitive identifiers, long copied content, or private row contents.
When done, respond exactly: Learning Summary Complete

assistant_messages.tool_round_limit: I reached the 50-round tool limit while inspecting local data, so I could not finish a reliable answer. Please ask a narrower question or continue with a more specific follow-up.

tool_errors.not_allowed_for_turn: Tool is not allowed for this turn.

function.name: database_list_info
function.description: List approved SQLite databases with safe metadata, short descriptions, and availability state.

function.name: database_query
function.description: Run one bounded read-only SELECT or EXPLAIN query against an approved SQLite database.

sql.description: One SELECT or EXPLAIN statement. Do not use PRAGMA, ATTACH, writes, multiple statements, paths, or limit settings. For uncertain typeless flags, sample typeof() and values first.

function.name: helper_datetime_to_iso8601
function.description: Convert numeric timestamps to UTC ISO8601 for display. Default unit is unix_seconds.

function.name: helper_datetime_from_iso8601
function.description: Convert UTC ISO8601 datetimes or YYYY-MM-DD dates to numeric timestamps for SQL predicates. Default unit is apple_seconds.

datetimes.description: Comma-separated UTC ISO8601 datetimes or YYYY-MM-DD dates.

function.name: helper_fontawesome_icons_search
function.description: Search Strappy's Font Awesome shortcode catalog by icon purpose or name. Use when an assistant response would benefit from a visual marker and the right shortcode is not obvious.

query.description: Optional icon purpose or name to search, such as warning, calendar, database, github, or send.

limit.description: Optional maximum icons. Defaults to 20; maximum is 50.

function.name: memory_user_fact_read
function.description: Read remembered stable user facts when personal context may help.

limit.description: Optional maximum facts. Defaults to 20; maximum is 50.

function.name: memory_user_fact_remember
function.description: Remember one small stable user fact. Do not store secrets, sensitive identifiers, or long copied content.

subject.description: Who or what the fact is about.

confidence.description: Optional confidence from 0.0 to 1.0. Defaults to 0.75.

function.name: memory_user_fact_forget
function.description: Forget one remembered user fact by exact id.

function.name: helper_session_name_write
function.description: Name the active chat session with a short title. Writes only if the session is untitled.

name.description: Short title based on the user's request.

function.name: database_context_read
function.description: Read database metadata, simplified schema, and remembered database hints. Requires database_id, query, kind, or limit.

limit.description: Optional maximum hints. Defaults to 20; maximum is 50.

function.name: memory_database_hint_remember
function.description: Remember one evidence-backed database hint, such as a join recipe, timestamp unit, or caveat. Do not store private row content.

evidence.description: Optional short evidence or sample-query note.

confidence.description: Optional confidence from 0.0 to 1.0. Defaults to 0.75.

function.name: memory_database_hint_forget
function.description: Forget one remembered database hint by exact id.
